overall.description: A first-person perspective from inside a futuristic flying car in Cyberpunk 2077, taking off from a neon-lit street and navigating at high speed through a dense cyberpunk cityscape filled with holographic advertisements and towering skyscrapers. The vehicle maneuvers between buildings and past massive billboards in a perpetual night setting illuminated by vibrant neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: street in front of pharmaceutical building with neon signage

events.description: flying car takes off from ground level and begins rapid ascent

agents.ego_description: piloting a futuristic flying car, taking off from the street in front of a glowing pharmaceuticals building

entered.detail: multi-story building with large illuminated 'PHARMACEUTICALS' sign in cyan neon
bright cyan neon sign spelling PHARMACEUTICALS above a doorway
futuristic vehicle interior with glowing controls and holographic displays
curved glass and metal frame of the flying car cockpit

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at street level in a cyberpunk city at night, facing a building with a prominent cyan 'PHARMACEUTICALS' neon sign. The vehicle dashboard is visible in the foreground. At approximately 2.5 seconds, the car lifts off the ground and begins ascending rapidly into the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude aerial corridor above downtown

events.description: transition from street level to high altitude flight with city lights visible below
vehicle banks sharply left while navigating between distant skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: flying at high speed above the city grid, banking between illuminated skyscrapers while other flying traffic appears as distant lights

entered.detail: expansive view of the cyberpunk cityscape with countless illuminated windows and neon signs
grid pattern of street lights visible far below on the city streets
tall dark building with illuminated windows on the left horizon
tall building with neon accents on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The vehicle has reached high altitude and flies over the sprawling neon-lit city. The camera banks left and right as it navigates between distant skyscrapers. Below, the street lights form a glowing grid pattern, and other flying vehicles appear as small lights in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense neon district with close-proximity skyscrapers and holographic advertisements

events.description: entering dense cluster of skyscrapers with close proximity flying
flying close to large DTR billboard temporarily obscures part of the view

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through narrow gaps between towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements and holographic displays

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with 'DTR' logo and holographic elements
cluster of floating holographic advertisements between buildings
tall buildings covered in vertical neon strips and glowing windows

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dense urban canyon, flying between closely packed skyscrapers adorned with vibrant neon lights. Large holographic advertisements float between buildings, and the DTR billboard becomes prominent on the right. The space is tight, requiring precise navigation between the towering structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical billboard canyon with massive holographic advertisements

events.description: passing large 'VOTE' holographic billboard with political advertisement
approaching and passing the massive 'Set Sail for Flavor' vertical billboard structure

agents.ego_description: flying through a corridor of massive vertical billboards and holographic advertisements at high speed

entered.detail: large vertical holographic display showing political 'VOTE' messaging with candidate images
massive vertical neon billboard reading 'Set Sail for Flavor' with product imagery
tall structures covered in multiple layers of glowing advertisements

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues through a canyon of massive advertising structures. A prominent 'VOTE' holographic billboard appears directly ahead, followed by the enormous 'Set Sail for Flavor' vertical advertisement on the right. The buildings are densely packed with neon signage creating a tunnel of light.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed urban area with varied neon lighting and industrial structures

events.description: entering area with darker ambiance and prominent purple neon signage including 'Lizzie's Bar'

agents.ego_description: continuing high-speed flight through a darker district with purple and blue neon accents, approaching a landing zone

entered.detail: neon sign for 'Lizzie's Bar' with distinctive purple lighting
cluster of purple and magenta neon signs and building accents
dark industrial buildings with minimal lighting on the right side

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle flying through a darker area of the city with a shift to purple neon lighting. The 'Lizzie's Bar' sign becomes visible on the left, and the environment transitions to a mix of industrial structures and sparse neon signage as the vehicle continues its flight path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a neon-lit street level into the dense, high-altitude canyons of a futuristic metropolis. It begins at ground level facing a cyan Pharmaceuticals neon sign, with the vehicle dashboard visible before the car lifts off and climbs rapidly into the night sky. As the vehicle reaches a high altitude, the perspective expands to reveal a sprawling city grid of glowing street lights and distant flying traffic while the camera banks through the open air between skyscrapers. The scene then shifts into a tight urban canyon, weaving between closely packed towers adorned with vibrant lights and floating holographic advertisements. The movement finally tightens as the vehicle navigates the narrow space past a prominent DTR billboard embedded among the towering structures.

The shot follows a continuous flight through a dense canyon of neon advertisements that gradually transitions into a darker, more industrial urban sector. It begins by weaving through a tunnel of light dominated by massive advertising structures, passing a prominent VOTE holographic billboard and an enormous vertical Set Sail for Flavor sign. As the vehicle pushes forward, the overwhelming brightness of the commercial district begins to recede, and the lighting shifts from vibrant multi-colors to deep purple neon tones. The scene then opens up to reveal the Lizzie's Bar sign on the left before finally gliding past a mix of sparse signage and industrial structures.
